skills.dss_signature: Extract content or generate professional .docx files using python-docx or docx-js.
hard_constraints: Use XML entities (“) for smart quotes.
Metadata Author must be set to 'LLM'.

skills.dss_signature: Generate structured XLSX with zero formula errors.

hard_constraints: Set document title and author metadata.
Avoid image-only PDFs unless explicitly requested.

skills.dss_signature: Emit strict JSON outputs conforming to published schemas.
hard_constraints: All outputs must validate against schema.
No additional properties outside the declared contract.

skills.dss_signature: Generate and validate IFC-oriented spatial coordination outputs.
hard_constraints: Report schema version compatibility in deliverable notes.

skills.dss_signature: Create geospatially-aware outputs with reproducible coordinate references.
hard_constraints: Unit system must be consistent across exported layers.
